description: 50-SKU placeholder panel for the Step 3n misc-retailer slot bench. Mike will replace with curated SKUs once the Serper Shopping flag is live; until then the executor seeds a balanced mix of mainstream + boutique queries to stress the KNOWN_RETAILER_DOMAINS filter (Walmart/Amazon dominate mainstream, while boutique/specialty retailers carry the long tail the slot exists to surface).
